'''fadhono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feathergrass|feathergrass]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feathergrass|feathergrass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fadhono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædheneth|fædheneth]] || [[word:fædhenej|fædhenej]] || [[word:fædhenesh|fædhenesh]] || [[word:fædhene|fædhene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhodhonoth|fadhodhonoth]] || [[word:fadhodhonoj|fadhodhonoj]] || [[word:fadhodhonosh|fadhodhonosh]] || [[word:fadhodhono|fadhodhono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhonoth|fadhonoth]] || [[word:fadhonoj|fadhonoj]] || [[word:fadhonosh|fadhonosh]] || [[word:fadhono|fadhono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhofnoth|fadhofnoth]] || [[word:fadhofnoj|fadhofnoj]] || [[word:fadhofnosh|fadhofnosh]] || [[word:fadhofnof|fadhofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadhonotho|fadhonotho]] || [[word:fadhonojo|fadhonojo]] || [[word:fadhonosho|fadhonosho]] || [[word:fadhonoko|fadhonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadhonoth|fadhonoth]] || [[word:fadhonoj|fadhonoj]] || [[word:fadhonosh|fadhonosh]] || [[word:fadhono|fadhono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadhonothol|fadhonothol]] || [[word:fadhonojol|fadhonojol]] || [[word:fadhonoshol|fadhonoshol]] || [[word:fadhonokol|fadhonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadhonothotho|fadhonothotho]] || [[word:fadhonojojo|fadhonojojo]] || [[word:fadhonoshosho|fadhonoshosho]] || [[word:fadhonoko|fadhonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadhonothon|fadhonothon]] || [[word:fadhonojon|fadhonojon]] || [[word:fadhonoshon|fadhonoshon]] || [[word:fadhonokon|fadhonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadhonothoro|fadhonothoro]] || [[word:fadhonojoro|fadhonojoro]] || [[word:fadhonoshoro|fadhonoshoro]] || [[word:fadhonokoro|fadhonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
